text:
First, note that time zones as we know them did not exist in 1305.  
But if we treat this as a modern time zone conversion ignoring historical changes:  

- Europe/Paris is UTC+1 in standard time (February is winter).  
- US/Eastern is UTC-5 in standard time.  
- Time difference = UTC+1 to UTC-5 = 6 hours behind Paris.  

2 PM Paris = 14:00 Paris time.  
14:00 − 6 hours = 08:00 same date.  

Date remains February 4, 1305.  

FINAL_ANSWER: 1305-02-04 08:00
